sections.content: The blue object moved down. Let me check its new position and plan a path to the yellow targets. I need to understand the movement pattern better - each step seems to move 4 cells. Let me check the current position and plan to reach the yellow blocks.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('b', 'Y'):
        b = n['boundary']
        min_r = min(p[0] for p in b)
        max_r = max(p[0] for p in b)
        min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
        max_c = max(p[1] for p in b)
        print(f"color={n['color']} bbox=[{min_r},{min_c}]-[{max_r},{max_c}]")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
